justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified "next Tuesday" as June 2nd and the preferred time of 9 AM, offering it as the first option.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all user requests in a single turn and confirmed the booking in the next, without any unnecessary exchanges.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth, professional, and directly addressed the user's needs, resulting in a positive customer experience.
